guardsplit.shortDescription: Averages Defense and Sp. Def stats with target.
guardsplit.description: The user and the target have their Defense and Special Defense stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Defense and Special Defense stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.

guardswap.shortDescription: Swaps Defense and Sp. Def changes with target.
guardswap.description: The user swaps its Defense and Special Defense stat stage changes with the target.

guillotine.shortDescription: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
guillotine.description: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

gunkshot.description: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

gust.shortDescription: Power doubles during Bounce, Fly, and Sky Drop.
gust.description: Power doubles if the target is using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop.
